name_en: 🆕 M14628 Blue! This small accessory cleverly blends classic and chic. It is made of iconic Monogram canvas, revealing a vibrant leather lining upon opening. This practical yet fun design is accented with an enamel charm and a metal charm, both featuring Louis' signature Monogram floral pattern. It can hold cash, coins, and three cards. 9x10x2.5cm
